name: Dell: Applying Its Business Value Model to Storage — Archival Data Package
description: Frictionless Data Package containing structured observations extracted from the Aberdeen Group profile 'Dell: Applying Its Business Value Model to Storage' (May 2004). The study analyzes Dell's storage strategy including the Dell|EMC partnership, PowerVault NAS products, tape backup solutions, and Dell's three core strategies of delivering value, driving standards, and moving high-end functionality downstream.

about.name: Enterprise Storage
about.description: Technologies and strategies for enterprise data storage including SAN, NAS, and tape backup

isPartOf.name: Aberdeen Group Archival Study Collection
isPartOf.description: Collection of digitized and structured Aberdeen Group technology research studies

distribution.name: studies.csv
distribution.description: Study metadata including title, authors, date, type, and assessment ratings

distribution.name: entities.csv
distribution.description: Companies, standards bodies, and organizations referenced in the study

distribution.name: technologies.csv
distribution.description: Storage technologies, products, and standards discussed in the study

distribution.name: observations.csv
distribution.description: Structured observations extracted from the study text with source line references

distribution.name: codes.csv
distribution.description: Controlled vocabulary codes for observation types, assessment ratings, and classifications

measurementTechnique: Archival Ingest Skill v13 — structured extraction of observations from analyst research documents with canonical observation types and assessment ratings

variableMeasured.name: observation_type
variableMeasured.description: Canonical type of observation: strategy-classification, viability-prediction, actual-outcome, technology-assessment, benchmark-result, framework-factor, market-data, expert-opinion

variableMeasured.name: importance
variableMeasured.description: Assessment of the study's importance within its subject domain

variableMeasured.name: relevance
variableMeasured.description: Assessment of the study's relevance to current technology landscape

variableMeasured.name: prescience
variableMeasured.description: Assessment of the study's predictive accuracy regarding future developments
